case_title: CAMPOS, JULIA VS CAMPOS, ALEJANDRO et al

docket_entries.description: DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CAMPOS, ALEJANDRO
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPOS, ALEJANDRO CONVALECENT MISSION VILLA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY CAMPOS, JULIA AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPOS, ALEJANDRO CONVALECENT MISSION VILLA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-12-1996 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAMPOS, JULIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAMPOS, ALEJANDRO CONVALECENT MISSION VILLA $1,749.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,764.00, DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE AS TO CONVALECENT VILLA. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT DENIED AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPOS, ALEJANDRO
